column1: # Format: CSV with header row. One GEM well per line.
# Use this for batch runs (multiple multi experiments).
#   sample_id      - output directory name for this Cell Ranger multi run
#   transcriptome  - path to Cell Ranger reference genome (for GEX library)
#   libraries_file - path to a pre-built libraries CSV for this sample
#                    The libraries CSV has columns: fastq_path
# and reference it via the libraries_file column. The config.yaml inline
# 'libraries:' block is simpler for single-run launches.
# Optional Titan integration columns (append to each row; leave blank if unused)
